nasb.text: “What kind of beloved is your beloved, O most beautiful among women? What kind of beloved is your beloved, That thus you adjure us?”

esv.text: What is your beloved more than another beloved, O most beautiful among women? What is your beloved more than another beloved, that you thus adjure us?

cnv.text: 你這女子中最美麗的啊！ 你的良人比別人的良人有甚麼更可愛之處呢？ 你的良人比別人的良人有甚麼更可愛之處呢？ 以致你這樣囑咐我們呢？

ccb.text: 绝色的佳人啊！ 你的良人与别的男子比较， 究竟有什么长处， 以致你这样恳求我们呢？
